reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 30-Night Aegean & Greek Islands Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Unbelievable Cruise!
reviews.body: Absolutely loved the balcony cabin and the service was top notch! The excursions in ports of call were well organized. Slipped off to 30-Night Aegean & Greek Islands Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 30-Night Aegean & Greek Islands Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Will cruise again
reviews.body: Outstanding itineraries and beautiful scenery. Dining was a culinary highlight every single night. Slipped off to 30-Night Aegean & Greek Islands Explorer and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 5
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 30-Night Aegean & Greek Islands Explorer and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 30-Night Aegean & Greek Islands Explorer | Viking Star | Viking Ocean Cruises
seo.metaDescription: Book a 30-night Greek Islands cruise onboard Viking Star of Viking Ocean Cruises. Visiting Athens (Piraeus), Santorini, Mykonos. Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
